events.name: WorldPride Music Festival - Global Dance Party Amsterdam

0.description: Peak winter brings a biting chill with frequent sleet or cold rain. Heavy insulation and waterproof layers are essential for any outdoor activity.
0.gear: Heavy coat, waterproofs, gloves, scarf, hat.

1.description: Skies stay predominantly gray. The dampness makes the temperature feel colder than it is; high-quality woolens and wind-resistant layers are recommended.
1.gear: Heavy wool layers, waterproof jacket, warm boots.

2.description: A slight thaw begins, but the air remains sharp. Perfect for walking tours if wearing a moderate jacket and comfortable boots.
2.gear: Mid-weight jacket, light scarf, waterproof shoes.

3.description: Spring is in full swing. Days are pleasantly mild, though evenings drop quickly, making a versatile light jacket or sweater a must-pack.
3.gear: Light jacket, layers for cool evenings, comfortable walking shoes.

4.description: The most temperate time for walking. Bright intervals are common, making it ideal for park visits and boat tours with just a light outer layer.

5.description: Excellent summer weather that isn't overbearing. Perfect for outdoor dining and late-night strolls; light breathable fabrics are best.
5.gear: Light cottons, a thin layer for evenings, comfortable sandals.

6.description: The warmest month of the year. Expect vibrant energy in the streets; while mostly sunny, occasional clouds provide a welcome break from the heat.
6.gear: Lightweight clothing, sunscreen, a light jacket for evenings.

7.description: Summer lingers with reliable warmth. Great for all-day sightseeing; stay hydrated and wear light clothing to remain comfortable in the sun.
7.gear: Light clothing, sunscreen, sunglasses, water bottle.

8.description: A beautiful transition month. The harshness of summer fades into golden, mild afternoons that are perfect for extended photography walks.
8.gear: Light jacket, layers for variable temperatures.

9.description: Autumn dampness sets in. Skies turn moody with frequent showers; waterproof footwear and a compact umbrella are essential for daily use.
9.gear: Waterproof jacket, warm layers, waterproof boots, umbrella.

10.description: The city turns gray and chilly. Brisk winds are common, so windbreakers and warm scarves are recommended for navigating the streets.

11.description: Winter returns with a mix of cold rain and mist. Full winter gear, including gloves and hats, is necessary for visiting outdoor holiday markets.
11.gear: Heavy winter coat, gloves, hat, scarf, waterproof boots.

bangkok_thailand.lgbtqSafety: Thailand: Very Safe. Known as the "Land of Smiles", widely accepted.

0.description: Cool season by Thai standards. Days are hot and bright, but humidity is lower and nights cool down noticeably.

1.description: Still the cool/dry season. Very hot days but humidity is manageable for walking and sightseeing.

2.description: Late cool season turning hot. Days are blazing; humidity begins creeping up. Plan activities for morning/evening.

3.description: Hottest and most humid month. Oppressive conditions require careful activity planning and frequent air-conditioning breaks.

4.description: Heat and humidity peak as monsoon season begins. Sudden afternoon thunderstorms provide dramatic relief.

5.description: Full monsoon season. Heavy daily rain, high humidity, and heat. Everything is lush and wet.
5.gear: Lightweight clothing, rain jacket, water-resistant shoes.

6.description: Peak monsoon. Persistent rain and extreme humidity. Streets flood; mosquitos are active.
6.gear: Light clothing, rain gear, waterproof shoes.

7.description: Continued monsoon conditions. Less intense than June/July but still wet and humid daily.

8.description: Late monsoon, rain begins easing slightly. Still wet and humid but less intense than early season.
8.gear: Light clothing, rain gear, quick-dry fabrics.

9.description: Monsoon winding down. Rain becomes less frequent; humidity still high but improving.
9.gear: Light clothing, light rain jacket, comfortable shoes.

10.description: Transition month. Rain decreases significantly; humidity begins dropping. Conditions improve noticeably.
10.gear: Light layers, light jacket for evenings.

11.description: Cool season returns. Clear skies, lower humidity, perfect travel conditions. This is peak season.
11.gear: Light clothing, light jacket for evenings, comfortable shoes.

bangkok_thailand.name: Bangkok, Thailand

0.gear: Light layers, sunglasses, jacket for evenings.

1.description: Late winter maintains the perfect weather. Still cool mornings and evenings, but afternoons are gorgeous.

2.description: Spring arrives with wildflower blooms. Temperatures rise noticeably; days are hot and clear.

3.description: Late spring turns to early summer. Heat intensifies; direct sun becomes strong. Pool time recommended.

4.description: Early summer heat sets in. Afternoons are blazing; even nights are warm. Morning activities best.

5.description: Peak heat arrives. Daytime temps are dangerous for outdoor activity. Indoors and pools are essential.
5.gear: Loose lightweight clothing, hat, sunglasses, water.

6.description: The absolute hottest month. Outdoor activity is limited to early morning/late evening. Stay hydrated.
6.gear: Minimal lightweight clothing, hat, sunscreen, water.

7.description: Still brutal heat, though slightly less intense than July. Pool parties and indoor activities dominate.
7.gear: Loose clothing, sunscreen, water bottle, hat.

8.description: Late summer, heat beginning to ease slightly. Mornings are slightly cooler; evenings remain warm.

9.description: Fall arrives with relief. Temperatures drop noticeably; outdoors becomes enjoyable again.

10.description: Fall in full swing. Warm days, cool evenings, perfect for exploring and dining outdoors.

11.description: Winter season returns. Days stay pleasant; nights cool down. Season's first frost possible.
11.gear: Light jacket, layers, sweater for evenings.

sydney_australia.lgbtqSafety: Australia: Very Safe. Strong legal protections.

0.description: Peak summer brings vibrant outdoor energy. Days are hot and bright; humidity is high but offset by ocean breezes and frequent beach swims.

1.description: Still warm and tropical. Afternoon thunderstorms cool things down quickly; they're usually quick but dramatic.

2.description: Transition into autumn. Still warm, but rain is more common now, and humidity eases.

3.description: Autumn in full swing. Clear days and pleasant temperatures make this perfect for sightseeing without summer's intensity.

4.description: Crisp and clear. Days are bright and mild; evenings require a light layer. This is peak season weather.
4.gear: Light jacket or sweater, walking shoes.

5.description: Early winter arrives. Still many sunny days, but mornings and evenings turn cool. Water activities still pleasant.

6.description: The coolest month. Mornings can be chilly, but winter is mild by global standards, and sunny days are common.

7.description: Late winter heading toward spring. Days warm up nicely, but nights are still crisp. Humidity is very low.

8.description: Spring transition. Wind picks up but days are warming nicely. This month has the least rain of the year.

9.description: Spring in full glory. Warm, dry, and clear—absolutely beautiful for outdoor exploring and photography.

10.description: Spring moving toward summer. Warm and sunny with low rainfall. Perfect beach and outdoor weather is returning.

11.description: Early summer builds. Days are hot and bright; humidity begins to rise as the season transitions to peak summer.
